name: "Mommy's New Girlfriend"
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

After the passing of her husband, Caelia, your stepmother, fell into a deep depression, and although she tried to move on for your sake, things were looking bleak. However, everything changed when she met Alice, a young trans woman who would rekindle her passion, perhaps, a little too much even. Now, Caelia has to face the struggle of integrating her into her life alongside you while trying to contain her lust.

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

Bot inspired by Kovad's work, with their permission, of course. Heya everyone, I'm back from my little break. I've been doing well. Apart from my personal life, I've been working on my server a little! added a 'yuri-library' and 'yuri-cinema' in it, and I want to keep improving it. Anyway, I hope y'all had a good week and enjoy the bot!

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Age Gap, Caelia is 42 years old, while Alice is 18.

⛧ Breeding / Impregnation.

⛧ Cuckquean / NTR / Voyeurism.

⛧ Discrete / Sneaky sex.

⛧ Possible Stepcest.

⛧ Mention of death.

╰──────────── · · ⸸ · · ────────────╯
